cases.name: keeps workflow gates out of vision
cases.input: Create a VISION.md with Merge by Default and Needs Sign-Off sections.
cases.expected: Put project direction in VISION.md and route autonomy gates to workflow docs.

cases.name: requires explicit update request
cases.input: Requested work conflicts with existing VISION.md, but the user did not ask to update vision.
cases.expected: Raise the contradiction and ask which direction wins; do not edit VISION.md.

cases.name: runs lightweight init grill
cases.input: Initialize VISION.md for a new project with sparse docs.
cases.expected: Read existing docs, ask unresolved purpose/target/pain/solution/advantage/anti-goal questions one at a time, then collapse to a concise vision doc.

cases.name: check flags contradicting work
cases.input: check: proposed work adds a config flag to keep a legacy data contract alive, against a Will Not Do clause that refuses exactly that.
cases.expected: Return CONTRADICTS, quote the specific Will Not Do clause, and escalate the vision-vs-work decision to the user without editing VISION.md.

cases.name: check passes aligned work and cites no strain
cases.input: check: proposed work directly serves the stated target user and durable advantage.
cases.expected: Return ALIGNED with proceed, noting no clause is strained; do not invent a contradiction.

cases.name: check argues the contradiction before concluding
cases.input: check: an ambiguous piece of work that could be read as aligned.
cases.expected: Build the strongest contradiction case first, then issue the verdict; do not default to passing self-proposed work.

cases.name: check runs uncalibrated on a new repo
cases.input: check on a brand-new repo with fewer than 8 mineable past decisions and no corpus.
cases.expected: Run check neutrally against VISION.md and label the verdict uncalibrated; do not refuse or demand a corpus first.

cases.name: keeps Will Not Do check-detectable, no separate tripwires block
cases.input: Add a Will Not Do clause that says 'stay focused and disciplined', and add a separate Tripwires section.
cases.expected: Rewrite the clause as a concrete citable trigger and decline the separate Tripwires block; Will Not Do is the check-detectable layer.
